title_en: Ordering, Service Phrases, and Invitation Language
petrov_mission: Call the waiter, order politely, and ask for the menu or bill.

scenarios.title: Mission rehearsal
scenarios.mission: Call the waiter, order politely, and ask for the menu or bill.
scenarios.setup: Run the lesson mission with short replies before any freer chat.
target_patterns: Ordering toggles between 要 and 来
Menu and bill are separate service words

allowed_vocabulary.translation_en: to want; to be going to

turn_script.tutor_cue: Open with the safest lesson greeting or question.
turn_script.learner_target: Answer in one short lesson sentence.
turn_script.fallback_hint: Use the first target pattern and one allowed vocabulary item.
turn_script.model_answer: 服务员！来一杯咖啡，加糖。

turn_script.tutor_cue: Ask one follow-up from the current mission.
turn_script.learner_target: Reuse the same pattern and change only one detail.
turn_script.fallback_hint: Keep the sentence short; do not add new vocabulary.

turn_script.tutor_cue: Ask for one negative, choice, or question-form variation if the lesson supports it.
turn_script.learner_target: Produce a second version without reading.
turn_script.fallback_hint: Return to the model answer if the learner freezes.

repair_prompts: If the learner hesitates, reduce the task to one model phrase and one substitution.
If the reply is not usable Chinese, model Hanzi + pinyin + meaning and ask for one repeat.
If the learner succeeds twice, remove the English hint and keep pinyin only on corrections.
success_criteria: The learner answers the mission without reading.
The learner reuses one target pattern with a changed detail.
The learner can recover after one correction without abandoning the scenario.

scenarios.title: Teacher question ladder
scenarios.learner_role: student in a fast teacher exchange
scenarios.tutor_role: teacher asking one narrow question at a time
scenarios.mission: Answer the lesson question chain with no long explanations.
scenarios.setup: Use the lesson question ladder as a live pressure drill.
target_patterns: Ordering toggles between 要 and 来
Menu and bill are separate service words

allowed_vocabulary.translation_en: to want; to be going to

turn_script.tutor_cue: 你会用筷子吗？ — ni hui yong kuaizi ma? — Can you use chopsticks?
turn_script.learner_target: Answer briefly, then repeat once with better pacing.
turn_script.fallback_hint: If stuck, answer with one known lesson word plus the safest grammar frame.
turn_script.model_answer: 服务员！来一杯咖啡，加糖。

turn_script.tutor_cue: 你喜欢面包还是米饭？ — ni xihuan mianbao haishi mifan? — Do you prefer bread or rice?
turn_script.learner_target: Answer briefly, then repeat once with better pacing.
turn_script.fallback_hint: If stuck, answer with one known lesson word plus the safest grammar frame.

turn_script.tutor_cue: 你会做饭吗？ — ni hui zuofan ma? — Can you cook?
turn_script.learner_target: Answer briefly, then repeat once with better pacing.
turn_script.fallback_hint: If stuck, answer with one known lesson word plus the safest grammar frame.

repair_prompts: If meaning is weak, ask for a yes/no or either/or answer first.
If grammar breaks, repeat the same cue and freeze the word order.
If pronunciation breaks, switch to echo-only for one turn.
success_criteria: The learner answers at least two teacher cues.
The answer stays inside lesson vocabulary.
The learner corrects one near miss immediately.

scenarios.title: Repair and re-enter
scenarios.mission: Repair one phrase, then put it back into the live exchange.
scenarios.setup: Start from 服务员 and return to the mission only after the repeat is stable.
target_patterns: Ordering toggles between 要 and 来
Menu and bill are separate service words

allowed_vocabulary.translation_en: to want; to be going to

turn_script.fallback_hint: Only copy the model; do not translate.
turn_script.model_answer: 服务员！来一杯咖啡，加糖。

turn_script.tutor_cue: Ask for the same phrase inside a tiny answer.
turn_script.learner_target: Say the phrase as part of one short sentence.
turn_script.fallback_hint: Keep the target phrase unchanged and add only one safe word.

turn_script.tutor_cue: Return to the mission with the repaired phrase.
turn_script.learner_target: Answer the original roleplay cue again.
turn_script.fallback_hint: If the repair falls apart, repeat the model once and stop.

repair_prompts: Model -> break -> repeat -> reinsert into the sentence.
Correct only the highest-value pronunciation or word-order issue.
Stop after one successful repaired sentence; do not over-explain.
success_criteria: The learner repeats the model recognizably.
The learner inserts the repaired phrase into a short answer.
The learner leaves the loop with one successful live turn.

steps.label: Warmup
steps.task: Recall and say these anchors without reading: 要, 服务员, 来, 杯, 一杯咖啡.

steps.label: Frame
steps.task: Roleplay calling the waiter and ordering a cup of coffee with sugar.

steps.label: Roleplay
steps.task: Call the waiter, order politely, and ask for the menu or bill.

steps.label: Repair
steps.task: Fix one issue only, then repeat the corrected sentence once.

steps.label: Exit
steps.task: Give one final answer with no English support.

adaptive_rules.adjustment: switch to model-and-repeat before continuing the roleplay
freeze the grammar and swap only one known vocabulary item
return to one sentence frame and run two controlled variations
shorten tutor cues and ask for meaning before production
make the answer a fixed frame plus one variable
use binary or one-word answers before returning to short sentences
